Template for docs/flows/<name>.md.
Copy this file, fill in each section, and delete this comment block.

-->

# <Flow Name>

## Purpose

<!-- What this flow accomplishes and why it matters. -->

## Trigger

<!-- What starts the flow. -->

## Participants

<!-- Systems, services, jobs, routes, or external providers involved. -->

## Step-by-step flow

<!-- The main sequence of behavior. -->

## Data and state changes

<!-- Data created, updated, deleted, or derived during the flow. -->

## Success behavior

<!-- What is true when the flow succeeds. -->

## Failure behavior

<!-- Important failure modes, fallbacks, and user-visible errors. -->

## External dependencies

<!-- External services, APIs, or configuration required. -->

## Invariants and assumptions

<!-- Rules that must remain true for this flow to behave correctly. -->

## Security and privacy notes

<!-- Security-sensitive behavior. Omit only if clearly irrelevant. -->

## Observability and debugging

<!-- How to debug this flow. -->

## Testing notes

<!-- Important tests and how to validate changes. -->

## Source map

<!-- Links to the most important source files. -->

## Related docs

<!-- Links to related system/flow docs, ADRs, glossary entries. -->
